zh.Of Theydon Garnon, Essex, England: 英國英格蘭艾可頓 加農
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Bradley於大約1535年出生在英國艾可頓 加農時，她的父親Thomas Bradleye17歲，母親Dorothy Bradley16歲。她於1556年8月6日與John Legate在英國艾可艾皮三結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1598年7月25日在英國英格蘭艾可頓 加農享年64歲，埋葬在英國艾可頓 加農。

zh-hans.Of Theydon Garnon, Essex, England: 英国英格兰艾可頓 加農
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Bradley于大约1535年出生在英国艾可頓 加農时，她的父亲Thomas Bradleye17岁，母亲Dorothy Bradley16岁。她于1556年8月6日与John Legate在英国艾可艾皮三结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1598年7月25日在英国英格兰艾可頓 加農享年64岁，埋葬在英国艾可頓 加農。

nameMeanings.name: Bradley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places throughout England named Bradley, from Old English brād ‘broad’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Scottish: habitational name from Braidlie in Roxburghshire.
Irish (Ulster): adopted as an English equivalent of Gaelic Ó Brolcháin ‘descendant of Brolacháin’, a diminutive of the personal name Brólach, compare Brawley . This was a learned family.

variants.name: Brawley
meanings: Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Brólaigh ‘descendant of Brolach’, a personal name possibly derived from brollach ‘breast’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
meanings: A name corrpted from Hannah, q.v. It is also found several times in a male name. From Ann, Anne, we have as nicknames Nan and Nancy

variants.name: Nancy
meanings: Of uncertain origin. From the 18th century it is clearly used as a pet form of   Ann   (  see  Nan  ), but it may originally have been a similar formation deriving from the common medieval given name   Annis  , a vernacular form of   Agnes .  Nowadays it is an independent name, and was especially popular in America in the 1930s, 40s, and 50s.

variants.name: Nan
meanings: Originally a pet form of Ann (for the initial N-, compare Ned ). It is now also widely used as a short form of Nancy .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Bradley was born about 1535, in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, her father, Thomas Bradleye, was 17 and her mother, Dorothy Bradley, was 16. She married John Legate on 6 August 1556, in Epping, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 25 July 1598, in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Bradley est née environ 1535, à Theydon Garnon, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Bradleye, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Dorothy Bradley, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé John Legate le 6 août 1556, à Epping, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 25 juillet 1598, à Theydon Garnon, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterrée à Theydon Garnon, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Bradley um 1535 in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Bradleye 17 und ihre Mutter Dorothy Bradley 16. Sie hat am 6. August 1556 in Epping, Essex, England John Legate geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Juli 1598 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Theydon Garnon, Essex, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Anne Bradleyが約1535年にイギリスエセックススエイドン ガーノンで生まれた時，父Thomas Bradleyeは17歳，母Dorothy Bradleyは16歳であった。1556年8月6日にイギリスエセックスエップイングでJohn Legateと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1598年7月25日にイギリスイギリスエセックススエイドン ガーノンで64歳で死去し，イギリスエセックススエイドン ガーノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Bradley(이)가 대략 1535년 영국 에세스 테이던 가넌에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Bradleye(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Bradley(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1556년 8월 6일 영국 에세스 핀그에서 John Legate(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1598년 7월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 테이던 가넌에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 테이던 가넌에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Legate em 6 de agosto de 1556, em Epping, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de julho de 1598, em Theydon Garnon, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultada em Theydon Garnon, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Bradley родилась около 1535 г. в местности тидон гарнон, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Bradleye было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Bradley, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Legate 6 августа 1556 г. в местности эппинг, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 25 июля 1598 г. в местности тидон гарнон, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и была похоронена в местности тидон гарнон, эссекс, Англия.
